column1: C[quark: Hi Alphyn. Have a good game.
C[Alphyn: Hi, yes, same to you)
C[quark: Good place to stop for me. Gotta get some work done...
Alphyn: ok, good luck with your work, I'll get some sleep )
C[quark: Thanks Alphyn. I'm going to break off for now.
C[quark: I made a really bad move with D13
Alphyn: And I replied with equally bad H11
quark: I'm not sure what my strength is. Haven't played in a long time.
quark: Yeah, I was sure I was going to lose that upper left group.
C[quark: Losing the middle group was inevitable after that.
C[Alphyn: How do I stop sacrifising stones for nothing like that?
Alphyn: Maybe I should join an Anoymous group or something.
quark: Always look where you can make eyes and deny the same for your opponent
quark: You're playing better than a 28kyu from what I remember
Alphyn: Trying to perform the second part usually results in a punishment )
C[quark: Yes, I just experienced that :)
C[Alphyn: Anyways I enjoy the game, and I hope you do too ) Hopefully I'll learn something from it )
quark: This is my first game since in years, so I'm enjoying it very much.
Alphyn: And for me it's the 3rd or 4th 19x19 game I've ever played )
quark: Wow! You're doing extremely well...
C[Alphyn: Thanks, I played hikaru no go on a gameboy vs an AI, but you can mainly play 9x9 and 13x13 there, It taught me some tactics at least, but it was long ago
Alphyn: I also read a book about Go written by some top Russian players )
C[Alphyn: But it contained passages like ""This move is the best here, because it's filled with harmony and ballance"". )
C[quark: Oh yeah, ""harmony and balance"" That helps...
C[quark: I was kidding of course.
C[Alphyn: I had a feeling that they tell me what is right, but don't explain why
Alphyn: Maybe I'm too harsh on them, maybe I just lack the game experience to understand
quark: ""Harmony and balance"" is too vague to be useful in my opinion
Alphyn: That's for sure, but it's not all like that ) I still think I should read it again latter, maybe I'll understand more
Alphyn: I don't know how that happend
C[Alphyn: why did you do that? could I really do something up there?
quark: Nah, we're coming to the end. we should just fill in those liberties
C[quark: Hello, I'm new here as well...have a good game!
jeffrey.sawyer: thanks sorry I don't get on over the weekends!
C[quark: Hi Prozz. Thanks for the game challenge!
C[quark: Hi Prozz. Thanks for the game challenge!
C[quark: Hello, have a good game.
C[Sevvy: Well played. Thanks for the game.
quark: Thank you for the game, Sevvy.
C[quark: Hi, have a good game.
C[quark: Hi, have a good game.
mladen: thanks, you too, or: Хвала, такође!
C[quark: Thanks for the game, mladen.
stephend: Hi.  I hope you enjoy the game!
C[stephend: Hi.  I hope you enjoy the game!
C[Tom Newman: Have a good game.
Tom Newman: Think that makes it clear this is over.
Tom Newman: Hopefully we can play again sometime.
quark: Thank you, Tom. This was a fun game.
C[quark: My apologies for missing a few days... busy time for me.
quark: Thank you. It was a good game.
